title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions:
Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance Ventures Solutions!
